basic_details.job_title: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 73 PGT, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Principal, PGT (Hindi, English, Maths, Biology, Chemistry, Physics), Computer Science Teacher, Full-Time Teacher, Part-Time Teacher, Care Taker, Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent/Clerk, Accountant, Cook, Chowkidar
basic_details.total_vacancies: 73 (52 new upgraded KGBV + 21 existing KGBV classes 6-8)
basic_details.job_location: Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas, Hamirpur District, UP
basic_details.short_information: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the Office of the District Basic Education Officer (Samagra Shiksha), Hamirpur, Uttar Pradesh, inviting applications for a total of 73 posts across newly upgraded and existing Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas. The vacancies include Principal, PGT teachers, full-time and part-time teachers, Computer Science teachers, Care Taker, Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent, Accountant, Cook, and Chowkidar posts. Only female candidates are eligible to apply, and the last date to submit applications by registered post is 25 July 2026.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: | Principal: Trained postgraduate in relevant subject with minimum four years teaching experience as a trained graduate teacher, or equivalent qualification as specified in the notification. PGT Hindi/English/Maths/Biology/Chemistry/Physics: Postgraduate degree in the relevant subject with B.Ed. or equivalent training qualification. Computer Science Teacher: MCA/B.Tech (Computer Science) or postgraduate diploma in computer applications from a recognised university. Care Taker: Class 12 pass. Lab Assistant: Diploma in laboratory technique with Science in High School, or Intermediate with Science stream. Office Superintendent/Clerk: Intermediate pass with Computer Science subject or a recognised computer diploma/certificate, along with minimum typing speed of 25 wpm Hindi and 30 wpm English. Full-Time Teacher (Maths/Science/English/Hindi): Trained graduate with B.Ed. or equivalent, and upper primary level TET qualification. Part-Time Teacher (Art-Music/Physical Education): Trained graduate in the relevant field (B.P.Ed. for Physical Education). Part-Time Teacher (Computer): Computer-trained graduate. Accountant: Graduate in commerce or with knowledge of office work; a diploma in DOEACC/O Level or equivalent is preferred. Cook and Chowkidar: Class 8 pass; the candidate must not be physically incapable or suffering from a contagious disease. | Age is calculated as on 1 April 2026: | Principal: Minimum 30 years, Maximum 45 years All other posts under both notifications: Minimum 25 years, Maximum 45 years | Age relaxation will be applicable as per the reservation policy of the State Government.

salary_details.details: Monthly remuneration is fixed as per the post applied for and ranges from approximately Rs. 6,433 for Cook and similar posts to Rs. 30,000 for the Principal post. The remuneration includes 13% EPF contribution of the employer, subject to a ceiling of Rs. 15,000 monthly salary. Exact figures for each post are listed in the vacancy tables above.

selection_process: Training/B.Ed. (Theory and Practical) Percentage obtained x 30/100
Selection for both notifications will be made purely on the basis of merit calculated using weightage marks
with interviews only for specific posts:
selection includes an interview of 50 marks: 20 for physical capability
and 10 for experience. For Chowkidar posts (existing KGBV)
the interview carries 50 marks: 25 for physical fitness and 25 for general knowledge. If two or more candidates score equal marks
the older candidate is ranked higher; if age also ties

candidates are ranked alphabetically by name. A waiting list of 5 candidates per vacant post will be prepared by the selection committee. Only women candidates are eligible; male applicants should not apply.
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format from the official website www.hamirpur.nic.in.
Fill the application form completely by hand in clear and neat handwriting. Cutting and overwriting are not acceptable.
Paste a recent self-attested passport-size photograph on the form.
Attach self-attested copies of all relevant educational, training, caste, and experience certificates.
Enclose two self-addressed envelopes with the required postage stamps.
Clearly mention the applied post, category, and subject in bold letters on top of the envelope, e.g., "Kasturba Gandhi Awasiya Balika Vidyalaya hetu Aavedan Patra."

Send the completed application only through Registered Post or Speed Post to the Office of the District Basic Education Officer, Samagra Shiksha, Hamirpur, so it reaches on or before 25 July 2026 within the specified time.
Submit a separate application for each post; applying for more than one post in a single form will lead to rejection.
Postal Address: Jila Basic Shiksha Adhikari, Janpad Hamirpur - 210301 (in front of District Hospital), Uttar Pradesh.
important_instructions: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for all posts under both notifications. Applications received via ordinary post, courier, email, or any mode other than registered/speed post will be rejected. Incomplete, unclear, unsigned, or applications without required certificates will be summarily rejected. Candidates convicted of a criminal offence, dismissed from any service for moral turpitude, or declared insolvent are not eligible. Full-time teachers, chowkidars, chief cooks, and assistant cooks must reside at the school premises after appointment. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease at the discretion of the department. No travelling allowance will be paid for attending counselling or interview. The contract is initially for the academic session 2026-27 and may be extended based on satisfactory performance; it may also be terminated at any time without prior notice for unsatisfactory performance. This recruitment is subject to the final order of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the related Special Leave Petition matter.

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the Office of the District Basic Education Officer (Samagra Shiksha), Hamirpur, Uttar Pradesh, inviting applications for a total of 73 posts across newly upgraded and existing Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas. The vacancies include Principal, PGT teachers, full-time and part-time teachers, Computer Science teachers, Care Taker, Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent, Accountant, Cook, and Chowkidar posts. Only female candidates are eligible to apply, and the last date to submit applications by registered post is 25 July 2026. This article covers complete details of both official notifications dated 4 July 2026, including vacancy breakup, eligibility criteria, age limit, salary, selection process, required documents, and the correct application procedure. Download KGBV Hamirpur New Upgraded KGBV - 52 Posts Job 2026 Notification PDF Download KGBV Hamirpur Existing KGBV - 21 Posts Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.details: District Basic Education Officer (Samagra Shiksha), Hamirpur, UP

Principal, PGT (Hindi, English, Maths, Biology, Chemistry, Physics), Computer Science Teacher, Full-Time Teacher, Part-Time Teacher, Care Taker, Lab Assistant, Office Superintendent/Clerk, Accountant, Cook, Chowkidar
73 (52 new upgraded KGBV + 21 existing KGBV classes 6-8)
Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas, Hamirpur District, UP

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Applications received through ordinary post or any mode other than registered post/speed post will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details: New Upgraded KGBV (52 Posts)
content_sections.text: This notification is for staff selection in newly upgraded Kasturba Gandhi Awasiya Balika Vidyalayas of Hamirpur district on a contract basis. Note: The stated honorarium includes 13% EPF contribution of the employer where applicable (for staff whose salary is up to Rs. 15,000).

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details: Existing KGBV Classes 6 to 8 (21 Posts)
content_sections.text: This notification covers 21 vacant teaching and non-teaching posts in existing Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalayas running classes 6 to 8 in Hamirpur district, following orders of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in Special Leave Petition No. 13563/2022 (State Project Director vs Saroj Morya and others). The contract period for these posts will be for 11 months 29 days, ending on 28 February 2027.

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: Principal: Trained postgraduate in relevant subject with minimum four years teaching experience as a trained graduate teacher, or equivalent qualification as specified in the notification. PGT Hindi/English/Maths/Biology/Chemistry/Physics: Postgraduate degree in the relevant subject with B.Ed. or equivalent training qualification. Computer Science Teacher: MCA/B.Tech (Computer Science) or postgraduate diploma in computer applications from a recognised university. Care Taker: Class 12 pass. Lab Assistant: Diploma in laboratory technique with Science in High School, or Intermediate with Science stream. Office Superintendent/Clerk: Intermediate pass with Computer Science subject or a recognised computer diploma/certificate, along with minimum typing speed of 25 wpm Hindi and 30 wpm English. Full-Time Teacher (Maths/Science/English/Hindi): Trained graduate with B.Ed. or equivalent, and upper primary level TET qualification. Part-Time Teacher (Art-Music/Physical Education): Trained graduate in the relevant field (B.P.Ed. for Physical Education). Part-Time Teacher (Computer): Computer-trained graduate. Accountant: Graduate in commerce or with knowledge of office work; a diploma in DOEACC/O Level or equivalent is preferred. Cook and Chowkidar: Class 8 pass; the candidate must not be physically incapable or suffering from a contagious disease. Age is calculated as on 1 April 2026: Principal: Minimum 30 years, Maximum 45 years All other posts under both notifications: Minimum 25 years, Maximum 45 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per the reservation policy of the State Government.

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Salary and Honorarium
content_sections.text: Monthly remuneration is fixed as per the post applied for and ranges from approximately Rs. 6,433 for Cook and similar posts to Rs. 30,000 for the Principal post. The remuneration includes 13% EPF contribution of the employer, subject to a ceiling of Rs. 15,000 monthly salary. Exact figures for each post are listed in the vacancy tables above.

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for both notifications will be made purely on the basis of merit calculated using weightage marks, with interviews only for specific posts: For Assistant Cook posts (existing KGBV), selection includes an interview of 50 marks: 20 for physical capability, 20 for cooking knowledge, and 10 for experience. For Chowkidar posts (existing KGBV), the interview carries 50 marks: 25 for physical fitness and 25 for general knowledge. If two or more candidates score equal marks, the older candidate is ranked higher; if age also ties, candidates are ranked alphabetically by name. A waiting list of 5 candidates per vacant post will be prepared by the selection committee. Only women candidates are eligible; male applicants should not apply.

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Required Documents
content_sections.text: Self-attested photocopies of all mark sheets and certificates (educational and training) Character certificate Date of birth certificate (High School/Class 8 certificate) Caste certificate issued by a competent authority (if applicable) Experience certificate (if claiming experience marks) Recent passport-size self-attested photograph pasted on the application form Two self-addressed envelopes with postage stamps affixed (Rs. 45 each) Aadhaar number details

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application format from the official website www.hamirpur.nic.in . Fill the application form completely by hand in clear and neat handwriting. Cutting and overwriting are not acceptable. Paste a recent self-attested passport-size photograph on the form. Attach self-attested copies of all relevant educational, training, caste, and experience certificates. Enclose two self-addressed envelopes with the required postage stamps. Clearly mention the applied post, category, and subject in bold letters on top of the envelope, e.g., "Kasturba Gandhi Awasiya Balika Vidyalaya hetu Aavedan Patra." Send the completed application only through Registered Post or Speed Post to the Office of the District Basic Education Officer, Samagra Shiksha, Hamirpur, so it reaches on or before 25 July 2026 within the specified time. Submit a separate application for each post; applying for more than one post in a single form will lead to rejection. Postal Address: Jila Basic Shiksha Adhikari, Janpad Hamirpur - 210301 (in front of District Hospital), Uttar Pradesh.

content_sections.heading: KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for all posts under both notifications. Applications received via ordinary post, courier, email, or any mode other than registered/speed post will be rejected. Incomplete, unclear, unsigned, or applications without required certificates will be summarily rejected. Candidates convicted of a criminal offence, dismissed from any service for moral turpitude, or declared insolvent are not eligible. Full-time teachers, chowkidars, chief cooks, and assistant cooks must reside at the school premises after appointment. The number of vacancies may increase or decrease at the discretion of the department. No travelling allowance will be paid for attending counselling or interview. The contract is initially for the academic session 2026-27 and may be extended based on satisfactory performance; it may also be terminated at any time without prior notice for unsatisfactory performance. This recruitment is subject to the final order of the Hon'ble Supreme Court in the related Special Leave Petition matter.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for KGBV Hamirpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application by registered post is 25 July 2026, by 5:00 PM for the new upgraded KGBV posts and by 4:00 PM for the existing KGBV posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary of a KGBV teacher in 2026?
faq.answer: Salary varies by post. PGT teachers receive Rs. 22,000 per month, full-time teachers in existing KGBVs receive Rs. 24,200 per month, and part-time teachers receive Rs. 12,181 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. Who can apply for KGBV Hamirpur posts?
faq.answer: Only female candidates meeting the prescribed educational qualification and age criteria for the respective post are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for KGBV Hamirpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit is 25 to 45 years as on 1 April 2026 for most posts, and 30 to 45 years for the Principal post.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for KGBV Hamirpur vacancy?
faq.answer: Candidates must fill the prescribed application form, attach self-attested documents and photographs, and send it only through registered post or speed post to the District Basic Education Officer, Hamirpur, before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is KGBV recruitment only for female candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, as per the official notification, only women candidates will be selected for all posts under this recruitment.
